name: UV Protection Sunglasses
description: Premium UV400 protection sunglasses with polarized lenses. Perfect for beach outings, summer drives, and outdoor adventures. Features lightweight frame design for all-day comfort.

name: Wooden Beach Sunglasses
description: Eco-friendly wooden sunglasses crafted from sustainable bamboo. UV400 protection with polarized lenses. Unique grain pattern makes each pair one-of-a-kind.

name: Summer Floral Outfit
description: Elegant floral print outfit perfect for summer occasions. Breathable fabric keeps you cool. Features adjustable waist and flowing silhouette for maximum comfort and style.

name: Orange Summer Jumpsuit
description: Vibrant orange jumpsuit that makes a bold summer statement. Lightweight and breathable with a comfortable relaxed fit. Perfect for beach parties and casual outings.

name: SPF 50+ Sunscreen
description: Broad spectrum SPF 50+ sunscreen with water-resistant formula. Non-greasy, fast-absorbing protection. Enriched with vitamin E and aloe vera for skin nourishment.

name: Beach Essentials Kit
description: Complete beach essentials kit including sunscreen, moisturizer, and after-sun lotion. Perfectly curated for a complete summer skin protection routine.

name: Striped Beach Outfit
description: Classic striped beach outfit with modern twist. Lightweight cotton blend perfect for hot summer days. Versatile design suitable for beach to street style.

name: Designer Beach Glasses Set
description: Premium designer sunglasses set with interchangeable lenses. Comes with elegant carrying case and cleaning cloth. Perfect gift for summer enthusiasts.
